n: Furled Banners of the White Hand

steps.t: Flags stand among the ruins and valleys north-east of Dale Sageford's encampment. Dale Sageford remains at his encampment near the bridge over the Mid…
Dale Sageford is at the hunter's camp, south-west of where you found the banners. You should return to Dale Sageford with the furled Orc-banners.
